untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (Eve & Adam double top formation) and breakout detection require chart pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicators list. These are visual/structural patterns that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived technical indicators. Additionally, 'BEAR_MARKET' and 'BULL_MARKET' are not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Translated volume trend (upward) as volume crossing above its 20-period SMA. Stop loss set to 5% as a reasonable default since AUTHOR_SILENT. Exit condition uses price crossing back above pivot as a reversal signal. The core pattern detection (double tops, Eve & Adam formation) and precise breakout confirmation cannot be mechanically expressed without pattern recognition capabilities.
